title: Call for Manufacturing Companies meeting up at Elevate, Enterprise instances

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, We at Clarios (Industry Automotive, Products Batteries and recycling, instance Enterprise 1000 users and expecting to at least double in coming years) would like to put a call out to anyone from a Manufacturing company wanting to meet up at Elevate 25 in NYC. Text 414 687 1012 with your name and company name if you are willing to connect with our team during the event and ongoing to share best practices and learnings. Hope to see you there!
